audience_policies.source_phrase: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass allows up to two people a discounted rate of $10.00 each. The ICA is always free to children 17 and under. The ICA is free to the public on Thursday nights from 5:00-9:00pm.
